title: Create: pickled
description: A create mod add-on that adds pickles and more
body:
The embodyment of the love of pickles, adds pickle based items and jokes.
plenty of items to check out and automate with Create.

including:
pickles (and stuff needed to make them)
pickle candy
pickle sword
pickle juice (too acidic for the normal person)
brine (when in the liquid it tell you somthing)
and the legendary pickle song (place pickle in jukebox)

recipes:
salt (for brine) mix kelp when heated
brine (for pickle) mix sugar water and salt when heated
pickle (for juice, food, and song) compact sea pickle and brine
pickle candy (to eat) mix sugar and pickle juice
pickle sword (weapon) stick and pickle in shapless crafting

No emi or jei YET

planned additions:
jei/emi recipe compats (hopefully?)
better textures
more content (later release)
fabric (?)
